title: Sound Explorer
subtitle: Discover the instruments of a sound bath
description: Tap, layer, and feel the sounds that create deep healing experiences

instruments.name: Singing Bowl
instruments.description: A metal bowl that sings when struck or rubbed. Its rich overtones create waves of harmonic resonance that slow brainwaves and calm the nervous system.
instruments.healing: Deep relaxation, stress relief, chakra balancing

instruments.name: Tibetan Bowl
instruments.description: Hand-hammered from seven metals, each Tibetan bowl carries a unique voice. The sustained vibration penetrates deeply into the body's tissues.

instruments.name: Gong
instruments.description: The gong produces a wash of complex, evolving harmonics — a symphony in a single strike. Its shimmering overtones can shift consciousness rapidly.
instruments.healing: Emotional release, theta state induction, full-body immersion

instruments.name: Handpan
instruments.description: A steel instrument played with the hands, creating ethereal melodic tones. Each note blooms with natural harmonics that dance and decay.

instruments.name: Native Flute
instruments.description: The breath becomes music. Each note carries the warmth of human expression — no two phrases are ever the same.

instruments.name: Wind Chimes
instruments.description: Delicate metal tubes that jingle and shimmer unpredictably — yet soothingly. Nature's own random music, governed by gravity and breeze.
instruments.healing: Space clearing, gentle awakening, energy movement

instruments.name: Tongue Drum
instruments.description: Steel tongues tuned to a pentatonic scale — every combination sounds beautiful. An instrument anyone can play and feel successful with.

instruments.name: Rainstick
instruments.description: Dried cactus filled with pebbles that cascade like falling rain. The sound instantly signals the body to soften and release.

events.name: Back to Basics
events.description: A gentle, accessible sound bath perfect for beginners. Core instruments, pure intention.

events.name: Deep Symphonic Sound Bath
events.description: The full orchestra. Layers of sound building into a complete immersive experience.

events.name: Crystal Singing Bowls
events.description: Pure crystal tones tuned to specific frequencies. Precision healing through sustained resonance.
